ogAlt: Algo Trading Center — automation that buys back your hours.

/.title: Algo Trading Center — The Time Capitalist
/.description: Automation that buys back your hours. Real Forex algorithms with verifiable live results — not a get-rich scheme.

/forex.title: Forex Trading Bots — Omnicor, Cenith, Golden
/forex.description: Three Forex MT4/MT5 expert advisors — EURUSD, GBPUSD and gold — sold as one bundle. Every license includes all three, with verified 2021–2026 backtests.

/crypto-futures-signals.title: Crypto Futures Signals — AI Trading Agent
/crypto-futures-signals.description: Live AI crypto futures signals: daily Buy/Sell calls with entry, stop and target — every result logged in a free public record. One subscription, all-access (crypto + Polymarket).

/polymarket.title: Polymarket Signals — AI event signals (crypto · macro · politics)
/polymarket.description: Live AI Polymarket signals on crypto, macro and market-moving political events. Decision-support you execute yourself, with results logged in the open.
